\caption{$Q_{48} = Q_{24} \cup \Ccls(Q_{24})$: three views of the $\Ccls$-closure of the canonical 6-vertex Rosen-closed seed graph. Tier counts $|A|/|B|/|C| = 6/12/30$.}
\label{fig:q48}
\end{figure}
